name: Boyfriends (Felix, Adrian, Vincent, Kevin)
description:
─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─

Hello hello lovelies! Welcome to my first ever bot! I noticed there weren't really any Boyfriends bots on here so I decided to make one myself. Any feedback is greatly appreciated! I'm sorry to all my girlies out there, but this is strictly MLM/Trans Masc only. I might make the Girlfriends next! Lots of love,

-Nova (σ≧▽≦)σ ~☆

─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─

Characters Belong to Refrainbow. Go support their work!

─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─

LLM can make the bot talk for you. I've done everything I can to minimize it. Simply reroll the message or edit the response to your liking! ❤︎₊ ⊹

─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─

Overlook

Being in a polycule isn't easy. It has it's ups and downs, but it's always so much better when things work out. Join Felix (Goth), Adrian (Nerd), Vincent (Prep), and Kevin (Jock) as they tackle head on having a new fifth (You!) in their relationship.

─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─
I recommend using a proxy for this sort of bot! Proxies can understand transgender and multi character bots better than LLM!
─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─
creator: NovaPop
